name for S&R":"Display Any (rgthree)","ue_properties":{"widget_ue_connectable":{},"input_ue_unconnectable":{},"version":"7.3"}},"widgets_values":["In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. 1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. She wears a dress with an off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel. She holds herself upright because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene. 2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear. In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene."],"color":"#222","bgcolor":"#000"},{"id":568,"type":"Note","pos":[-1763.9883409192332,-1871.2148347801954],"size":[357.355720850765,1088.0726339522882],"flags":{"collapsed":false},"order":3,"mode":0,"inputs":[],"outputs":[],"properties":{"ue_properties":{"version":"7.0.1","widget_ue_connectable":{}}},"widgets_values":["1st woman \"moimeme3\", young, has light skin, light brown hair in a loose updo, and is wearing a fitted white tank top paired with a pink cardigan and high-waisted red mini skirt that emphasizes her curvy physique and medium-sized breasts. She also wears black ankle-strap heels, giving a sleek, professional vibe to her outfit. This photograph captures a provocative interaction between two women in a softly lit room. In the blurred background, there are two other women seated at a table, engaged in conversation and adding depth to the scene. The room has a light ivory hue which contrasts against their darker outfits, and the textures of the wall and floor are smooth, indicative of modern design elements. Overall, the photograph creates a provocative, intimate atmosphere, emphasizing power dynamics through subtle, suggestive details. 2st woman \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is dressed in an all-black ensemble comprising of a button-up shirt and slacks that highlight her slender but shapely figure. She is gently resting her left hand on the face of the 1st woman, applying soft pressure with her fingers while gazing intently into her eyes. This act of intimate interaction exudes a sense of dominance and submission. This photograph captures a provocative interaction between two women in a softly lit room. In the blurred background, there are two other women seated at a table, engaged in conversation and adding depth to the scene. The room has a light ivory hue which contrasts against their darker outfits, and the textures of the wall and floor are smooth, indicative of modern design elements. Overall, the photograph creates a provocative, intimate atmosphere, emphasizing power dynamics through subtle, suggestive details. \n\n---\n\nIn a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. 1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward where wind might have touched them—or perhaps they merely sway due to gravity's tender pull. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel—the golden thread forming patterns reminiscent of vines entwined with blossoms—and one can almost hear their whispers as threads dance between loom and wearer. She holds herself upright yet relaxed, palms resting lightly over her abdomen near the belt buckle made visible only partially because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains despite being worn without ornamentation beyond modest chains holding charms resembling leaves or stars. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene—not quite dusk nor daybreak but somewhere sweetly suspended mid-sunrise. 2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear, crowned with a single silver headband that catches the light just enough to shimmer against the earthy tones around her. In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene—not quite dusk nor daybreak but somewhere sweetly suspended mid-sunrise."],"color":"#432","bgcolor":"#653"},{"id":572,"type":"7b90b761-3eb6-4fea-a398-96d6a2b5e423","pos":[-1358.671667665309,-2009.76923644496],"size":[423.3077642837534,1224.5766109993865],"flags":{},"order":4,"mode":0,"inputs":[{"name":"seed","type":"INT","widget":{"name":"seed"},"link":7128},{"name":"guidance","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"guidance"},"link":null},{"label":"LoRA-A","name":"lora_name","type":"COMBO","widget":{"name":"lora_name"},"link":null},{"label":"LA-strength_model","name":"strength_model","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_model"},"link":null},{"label":"LAstrength_clip","name":"strength_clip","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_clip"},"link":null},{"label":"LoRA B","name":"lora_name_1","type":"COMBO","widget":{"name":"lora_name_1"},"link":null},{"label":"LBstrength_model","name":"strength_model_1","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_model_1"},"link":null},{"label":"LBstrength_clip","name":"strength_clip_1","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_clip_1"},"link":null},{"label":"Setting","name":"value_1","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_1"},"link":null},{"name":"value","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value"},"link":null},{"name":"value_2","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_2"},"link":null},{"name":"value_3","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_3"},"link":null}],"outputs":[{"label":"IMAGE","localized_name":"IMAGE","name":"IMAGE","type":"IMAGE","links":[7127,7132]},{"name":"STRING","type":"STRING","links":[7131]}],"properties":{"proxyWidgets":[["-1","seed"],["-1","guidance"],["-1","lora_name"],["-1","strength_model"],["-1","strength_clip"],["-1","lora_name_1"],["-1","strength_model_1"],["-1","strength_clip_1"],["-1","value_1"],["-1","value"],["-1","value_2"],["-1","value_3"]],"cnr_id":"comfy-core","ver":"0.3.51","ue_properties":{"version":"7.0.1","widget_ue_connectable":{"text":true,"steps":true,"sampler_name":true,"scheduler":true,"width":true,"height":true,"batch_size":true}}},"widgets_values":[603308628458591,3.9,"MoiMeme/moimeme3-04.safetensors",0.95,0.1,"celestesh-04.safetensors",0.95,0.1,"In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity.","1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. She wears a dress with an off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel. She holds herself upright because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now.","2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear.","Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene."],"color":"#332922","bgcolor":"#593930"}],"links":[[7124,569,0,571,2,"STRING"],[7127,572,0,570,0,""],[7128,573,0,572,0,"INT"],[7131,572,1,576,0,"*"],[7132,572,0,571,0,"IMAGE"]],"groups":[],"definitions":{"subgraphs":[{"id":"7b90b761-3eb6-4fea-a398-96d6a2b5e423","version":1,"state":{"lastGroupId":1,"lastNodeId":601,"lastLinkId":7239,"lastRerouteId":0},"revision":0,"config":{},"name":"Flux.1Dev-LoRA","inputNode":{"id":-10,"bounding":[-2260.966670185349,-2047.3891440815066,141.390625,280]},"outputNode":{"id":-20,"bounding":[702.1702934243768,-2132.4819807975123,120,80]},"inputs":[{"id":"8f948745-f350-4498-aba2-231500f2195a","name":"seed","type":"INT","linkIds":[7133],"pos":[-2139.576045185349,-2027.3891440815066]},{"id":"90821474-425c-4c53-90e3-600060673de0","name":"guidance","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7200],"pos":[-2139.576045185349,-2007.3891440815066]},{"id":"b5baa8e8-74a5-4a2b-8ac8-827597a8e8b6","name":"lora_name","type":"COMBO","linkIds":[7203],"label":"LoRA-A","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1987.3891440815066]},{"id":"a9c07046-9ed0-45c8-92a7-c8bcb739b8a1","name":"strength_model","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7204],"label":"LA-strength_model","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1967.3891440815066]},{"id":"13a7793d-08c2-4c2e-b242-9da54a0f94b0","name":"strength_clip","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7205],"label":"LAstrength_clip","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1947.3891440815066]},{"id":"a09d1af4-d2a5-49aa-bb72-ffffe73ae45b","name":"lora_name_1","type":"COMBO","linkIds":[7206],"label":"LoRA name for S&R":"Display Any (rgthree)","ue_properties":{"widget_ue_connectable":{},"input_ue_unconnectable":{},"version":"7.3"}},"widgets_values":["In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. 1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. She wears a dress with an off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel. She holds herself upright because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene. 2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear. In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene."],"color":"#222","bgcolor":"#000"},{"id":568,"type":"Note","pos":[-1763.9883409192332,-1871.2148347801954],"size":[357.355720850765,1088.0726339522882],"flags":{"collapsed":false},"order":3,"mode":0,"inputs":[],"outputs":[],"properties":{"ue_properties":{"version":"7.0.1","widget_ue_connectable":{}}},"widgets_values":["1st woman \"moimeme3\", young, has light skin, light brown hair in a loose updo, and is wearing a fitted white tank top paired with a pink cardigan and high-waisted red mini skirt that emphasizes her curvy physique and medium-sized breasts. She also wears black ankle-strap heels, giving a sleek, professional vibe to her outfit. This photograph captures a provocative interaction between two women in a softly lit room. In the blurred background, there are two other women seated at a table, engaged in conversation and adding depth to the scene. The room has a light ivory hue which contrasts against their darker outfits, and the textures of the wall and floor are smooth, indicative of modern design elements. Overall, the photograph creates a provocative, intimate atmosphere, emphasizing power dynamics through subtle, suggestive details. 2st woman \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is dressed in an all-black ensemble comprising of a button-up shirt and slacks that highlight her slender but shapely figure. She is gently resting her left hand on the face of the 1st woman, applying soft pressure with her fingers while gazing intently into her eyes. This act of intimate interaction exudes a sense of dominance and submission. This photograph captures a provocative interaction between two women in a softly lit room. In the blurred background, there are two other women seated at a table, engaged in conversation and adding depth to the scene. The room has a light ivory hue which contrasts against their darker outfits, and the textures of the wall and floor are smooth, indicative of modern design elements. Overall, the photograph creates a provocative, intimate atmosphere, emphasizing power dynamics through subtle, suggestive details. \n\n---\n\nIn a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. 1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward where wind might have touched them—or perhaps they merely sway due to gravity's tender pull. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel—the golden thread forming patterns reminiscent of vines entwined with blossoms—and one can almost hear their whispers as threads dance between loom and wearer. She holds herself upright yet relaxed, palms resting lightly over her abdomen near the belt buckle made visible only partially because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains despite being worn without ornamentation beyond modest chains holding charms resembling leaves or stars. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene—not quite dusk nor daybreak but somewhere sweetly suspended mid-sunrise. 2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear, crowned with a single silver headband that catches the light just enough to shimmer against the earthy tones around her. In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene—not quite dusk nor daybreak but somewhere sweetly suspended mid-sunrise."],"color":"#432","bgcolor":"#653"},{"id":572,"type":"7b90b761-3eb6-4fea-a398-96d6a2b5e423","pos":[-1358.671667665309,-2009.76923644496],"size":[423.3077642837534,1224.5766109993865],"flags":{},"order":4,"mode":0,"inputs":[{"name":"seed","type":"INT","widget":{"name":"seed"},"link":7128},{"name":"guidance","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"guidance"},"link":null},{"label":"LoRA-A","name":"lora_name","type":"COMBO","widget":{"name":"lora_name"},"link":null},{"label":"LA-strength_model","name":"strength_model","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_model"},"link":null},{"label":"LAstrength_clip","name":"strength_clip","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_clip"},"link":null},{"label":"LoRA B","name":"lora_name_1","type":"COMBO","widget":{"name":"lora_name_1"},"link":null},{"label":"LBstrength_model","name":"strength_model_1","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_model_1"},"link":null},{"label":"LBstrength_clip","name":"strength_clip_1","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_clip_1"},"link":null},{"label":"Setting","name":"value_1","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_1"},"link":null},{"name":"value","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value"},"link":null},{"name":"value_2","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_2"},"link":null},{"name":"value_3","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_3"},"link":null}],"outputs":[{"label":"IMAGE","localized_name":"IMAGE","name":"IMAGE","type":"IMAGE","links":[7127,7132]},{"name":"STRING","type":"STRING","links":[7131]}],"properties":{"proxyWidgets":[["-1","seed"],["-1","guidance"],["-1","lora_name"],["-1","strength_model"],["-1","strength_clip"],["-1","lora_name_1"],["-1","strength_model_1"],["-1","strength_clip_1"],["-1","value_1"],["-1","value"],["-1","value_2"],["-1","value_3"]],"cnr_id":"comfy-core","ver":"0.3.51","ue_properties":{"version":"7.0.1","widget_ue_connectable":{"text":true,"steps":true,"sampler_name":true,"scheduler":true,"width":true,"height":true,"batch_size":true}}},"widgets_values":[603308628458591,3.9,"MoiMeme/moimeme3-04.safetensors",0.95,0.1,"celestesh-04.safetensors",0.95,0.1,"In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity.","1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. She wears a dress with an off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel. She holds herself upright because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now.","2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear.","Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene."],"color":"#332922","bgcolor":"#593930"}],"links":[[7124,569,0,571,2,"STRING"],[7127,572,0,570,0,""],[7128,573,0,572,0,"INT"],[7131,572,1,576,0,"*"],[7132,572,0,571,0,"IMAGE"]],"groups":[],"definitions":{"subgraphs":[{"id":"7b90b761-3eb6-4fea-a398-96d6a2b5e423","version":1,"state":{"lastGroupId":1,"lastNodeId":601,"lastLinkId":7239,"lastRerouteId":0},"revision":0,"config":{},"name":"Flux.1Dev-LoRA","inputNode":{"id":-10,"bounding":[-2260.966670185349,-2047.3891440815066,141.390625,280]},"outputNode":{"id":-20,"bounding":[702.1702934243768,-2132.4819807975123,120,80]},"inputs":[{"id":"8f948745-f350-4498-aba2-231500f2195a","name":"seed","type":"INT","linkIds":[7133],"pos":[-2139.576045185349,-2027.3891440815066]},{"id":"90821474-425c-4c53-90e3-600060673de0","name":"guidance","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7200],"pos":[-2139.576045185349,-2007.3891440815066]},{"id":"b5baa8e8-74a5-4a2b-8ac8-827597a8e8b6","name":"lora_name","type":"COMBO","linkIds":[7203],"label":"LoRA-A","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1987.3891440815066]},{"id":"a9c07046-9ed0-45c8-92a7-c8bcb739b8a1","name":"strength_model","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7204],"label":"LA-strength_model","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1967.3891440815066]},{"id":"13a7793d-08c2-4c2e-b242-9da54a0f94b0","name":"strength_clip","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7205],"label":"LAstrength_clip","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1947.3891440815066]},{"id":"a09d1af4-d2a5-49aa-bb72-ffffe73ae45b","name":"lora_name_1","type":"COMBO","linkIds":[7206],"label":"LoRA name for S&R":"Display Any (rgthree)","ue_properties":{"widget_ue_connectable":{},"input_ue_unconnectable":{},"version":"7.3"}},"widgets_values":["In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. 1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. She wears a dress with an off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel. She holds herself upright because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene. 2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear. In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene."],"color":"#222","bgcolor":"#000"},{"id":568,"type":"Note","pos":[-1763.9883409192332,-1871.2148347801954],"size":[357.355720850765,1088.0726339522882],"flags":{"collapsed":false},"order":3,"mode":0,"inputs":[],"outputs":[],"properties":{"ue_properties":{"version":"7.0.1","widget_ue_connectable":{}}},"widgets_values":["1st woman \"moimeme3\", young, has light skin, light brown hair in a loose updo, and is wearing a fitted white tank top paired with a pink cardigan and high-waisted red mini skirt that emphasizes her curvy physique and medium-sized breasts. She also wears black ankle-strap heels, giving a sleek, professional vibe to her outfit. This photograph captures a provocative interaction between two women in a softly lit room. In the blurred background, there are two other women seated at a table, engaged in conversation and adding depth to the scene. The room has a light ivory hue which contrasts against their darker outfits, and the textures of the wall and floor are smooth, indicative of modern design elements. Overall, the photograph creates a provocative, intimate atmosphere, emphasizing power dynamics through subtle, suggestive details. 2st woman \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is dressed in an all-black ensemble comprising of a button-up shirt and slacks that highlight her slender but shapely figure. She is gently resting her left hand on the face of the 1st woman, applying soft pressure with her fingers while gazing intently into her eyes. This act of intimate interaction exudes a sense of dominance and submission. This photograph captures a provocative interaction between two women in a softly lit room. In the blurred background, there are two other women seated at a table, engaged in conversation and adding depth to the scene. The room has a light ivory hue which contrasts against their darker outfits, and the textures of the wall and floor are smooth, indicative of modern design elements. Overall, the photograph creates a provocative, intimate atmosphere, emphasizing power dynamics through subtle, suggestive details. \n\n---\n\nIn a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. 1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward where wind might have touched them—or perhaps they merely sway due to gravity's tender pull. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel—the golden thread forming patterns reminiscent of vines entwined with blossoms—and one can almost hear their whispers as threads dance between loom and wearer. She holds herself upright yet relaxed, palms resting lightly over her abdomen near the belt buckle made visible only partially because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains despite being worn without ornamentation beyond modest chains holding charms resembling leaves or stars. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene—not quite dusk nor daybreak but somewhere sweetly suspended mid-sunrise. 2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear, crowned with a single silver headband that catches the light just enough to shimmer against the earthy tones around her. In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity. Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene—not quite dusk nor daybreak but somewhere sweetly suspended mid-sunrise."],"color":"#432","bgcolor":"#653"},{"id":572,"type":"7b90b761-3eb6-4fea-a398-96d6a2b5e423","pos":[-1358.671667665309,-2009.76923644496],"size":[423.3077642837534,1224.5766109993865],"flags":{},"order":4,"mode":0,"inputs":[{"name":"seed","type":"INT","widget":{"name":"seed"},"link":7128},{"name":"guidance","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"guidance"},"link":null},{"label":"LoRA-A","name":"lora_name","type":"COMBO","widget":{"name":"lora_name"},"link":null},{"label":"LA-strength_model","name":"strength_model","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_model"},"link":null},{"label":"LAstrength_clip","name":"strength_clip","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_clip"},"link":null},{"label":"LoRA B","name":"lora_name_1","type":"COMBO","widget":{"name":"lora_name_1"},"link":null},{"label":"LBstrength_model","name":"strength_model_1","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_model_1"},"link":null},{"label":"LBstrength_clip","name":"strength_clip_1","type":"FLOAT","widget":{"name":"strength_clip_1"},"link":null},{"label":"Setting","name":"value_1","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_1"},"link":null},{"name":"value","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value"},"link":null},{"name":"value_2","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_2"},"link":null},{"name":"value_3","type":"STRING","widget":{"name":"value_3"},"link":null}],"outputs":[{"label":"IMAGE","localized_name":"IMAGE","name":"IMAGE","type":"IMAGE","links":[7127,7132]},{"name":"STRING","type":"STRING","links":[7131]}],"properties":{"proxyWidgets":[["-1","seed"],["-1","guidance"],["-1","lora_name"],["-1","strength_model"],["-1","strength_clip"],["-1","lora_name_1"],["-1","strength_model_1"],["-1","strength_clip_1"],["-1","value_1"],["-1","value"],["-1","value_2"],["-1","value_3"]],"cnr_id":"comfy-core","ver":"0.3.51","ue_properties":{"version":"7.0.1","widget_ue_connectable":{"text":true,"steps":true,"sampler_name":true,"scheduler":true,"width":true,"height":true,"batch_size":true}}},"widgets_values":[603308628458591,3.9,"MoiMeme/moimeme3-04.safetensors",0.95,0.1,"celestesh-04.safetensors",0.95,0.1,"In a hushed, verdant garden bathed in soft, diffused daylight, two young women stand side by side as if caught in a quiet moment of contemplation or whispered conversation—each turned toward the other with gentle curiosity.","1st woman on the right \"moimeme3\", young and shorter, has light skin with professional makeup on her face including smokey eyeshadow, mascara and eyeliner and blusher, her light brown hair is styled in a loose updo. Her head is tilted towards the camera and her eyebrows are raised as she looks sidelong at the woman on the left. She wears a dress with an off-the-shoulder bodice with flounced shoulders framing her décolletage, cinched at the waist beneath which cascades a voluminous skirt lined with multiple tiers of ruffled hemming that billow slightly outward. Along this line, intricate embroidery adorns the front panel. She holds herself upright because of how tightly fitted the corsetry remains. Her dark brown curls nestle atop her crown, coiled back neatly behind ears trimmed delicately with pearl studs nestled close beside lobes awaiting attention—but none drawn upon now.","2nd woman on the left \"celestesh\", medium skin and long brown hair falling past her shoulders. She is the taller, buxom woman, wears a gown of muted rose-pink linen, its fabric drape suggesting both grace and subtle weight; it flows like watercolor across her form, catching the ambient light with delicate sheen along creases that whisper movement even when stillness reigns. The dress features softly gathered ruffles at the square neckline and short puffed sleeves edged with fine lace-like frills—a touch of romantic innocence. A central seam runs down from the bustline, adorned with tiny metallic buttons that gleam faintly under the sky’s mercy. Her hands are clasped gently before her waist, fingers interlaced, revealing rings—one simple band on each ring finger—that speak not of ostentation but of intimacy. Around her neck rests a slender gold chain bearing a small, ornate pendant shaped like a miniature flower, echoing the floral motifs hinted at nearby blooms. Her hair is styled into a loose yet elegant braid woven through braids above her ear.","Behind these figures stretches lush greenery—an unbroken hedge arching gracefully upward beyond eye level, acting as nature’s curtain separating worlds while simultaneously inviting closer inspection within its bounds. To either flank lies manicured grass verging onto gravel paths whose edges blur together seamlessly with moss-stained stone slabs hinting at old-world charm forgotten except here among such beauty. On the far right edge, clusters of wild roses bloom defiantly amidst scattered petals fallen silently since last night’s breeze passed overhead —their crimson hues contrasting beautifully against emerald foliage surrounding them. Further out reaches dense canopy filled with trees stretching high towards ominously dark clouds cloaked in gray haze, lending depth and mystery to the scene."],"color":"#332922","bgcolor":"#593930"}],"links":[[7124,569,0,571,2,"STRING"],[7127,572,0,570,0,""],[7128,573,0,572,0,"INT"],[7131,572,1,576,0,"*"],[7132,572,0,571,0,"IMAGE"]],"groups":[],"definitions":{"subgraphs":[{"id":"7b90b761-3eb6-4fea-a398-96d6a2b5e423","version":1,"state":{"lastGroupId":1,"lastNodeId":601,"lastLinkId":7239,"lastRerouteId":0},"revision":0,"config":{},"name":"Flux.1Dev-LoRA","inputNode":{"id":-10,"bounding":[-2260.966670185349,-2047.3891440815066,141.390625,280]},"outputNode":{"id":-20,"bounding":[702.1702934243768,-2132.4819807975123,120,80]},"inputs":[{"id":"8f948745-f350-4498-aba2-231500f2195a","name":"seed","type":"INT","linkIds":[7133],"pos":[-2139.576045185349,-2027.3891440815066]},{"id":"90821474-425c-4c53-90e3-600060673de0","name":"guidance","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7200],"pos":[-2139.576045185349,-2007.3891440815066]},{"id":"b5baa8e8-74a5-4a2b-8ac8-827597a8e8b6","name":"lora_name","type":"COMBO","linkIds":[7203],"label":"LoRA-A","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1987.3891440815066]},{"id":"a9c07046-9ed0-45c8-92a7-c8bcb739b8a1","name":"strength_model","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7204],"label":"LA-strength_model","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1967.3891440815066]},{"id":"13a7793d-08c2-4c2e-b242-9da54a0f94b0","name":"strength_clip","type":"FLOAT","linkIds":[7205],"label":"LAstrength_clip","pos":[-2139.576045185349,-1947.3891440815066]},{"id":"a09d1af4-d2a5-49aa-bb72-ffffe73ae45b","name":"lora_name_1","type":"COMBO","linkIds":[7206],"label":"LoRA
